title: Black Archive: Act I
intro: You begin on the outskirts of a drowned district, carrying too little money, too many questions, and a mind already under strain.

crossroads_hub.label: Rain Crossroads
crossroads_hub.map_blurb: Three routes cut away from a rain-black signpost. One glows with watch lamps, one disappears into market lanterns, one leans toward the old archive quarter.

night_market.label: Night Market
night_market.map_blurb: A maze of canvas stalls and shuttered shrines. Prices rise if you linger.

archive_stack.label: Archive Stack
archive_stack.map_blurb: A leaning municipal archive where locked ledgers have begun whispering through their bindings.

river_crossing.label: River Crossing
river_crossing.map_blurb: The ferryman waits beside a rope bridge while bells ring somewhere beyond the marsh.
